categories.title: Natural & Polished Gemstones
categories.description: A rich collection sourced from Latin America, Asia, Europe, and Africa — raw crystals, polished specimens, strands, and curated sets for collectors and seekers.

categories.title: Mosaic Lamps
categories.description: Handcrafted mosaic glass art — table lamps, wall sconces, and chandeliers in a spectrum of colors, shapes, and centuries-old patterns.

categories.title: Artisan Jewelry
categories.description: Necklaces, bracelets, rings, earrings, and keychains — each piece crafted from nature's finest gemstones with care and intention.

categories.title: Home Decor
categories.description: Statement decorative pieces, wall art, and artisan objects that bring warmth, culture, and elegance to any living space.

categories.title: Spiritual & Wellness
categories.description: Energy stones, meditation accessories, and spiritual centerpieces — curated for those who seek balance, clarity, and intention in daily life.

categories.title: Incense & Natural Oils
categories.description: Fragrances, essential oils, and scent collections that complement your home, rituals, and lifestyle with natural warmth.

categories.title: Swords & Knives
categories.description: Heritage blades and decorative weapons — each carrying the symbolism and craftsmanship of its cultural origins.

categories.title: Ethnic Clothing

categories.title: Gifts & Keepsakes
